---
title: "Probability"
format: html
author: "Pushpendu Biswas" 
execute:
  echo: false
---


```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
#| cache: true
throw_dice <- function(n, weights = rep(1/6, 6)) {
  die1 <- sample(1:6, n, replace = TRUE, prob = weights)
  die2 <- sample(1:6, n, replace = TRUE, prob = weights)
  die1 + die2
}
```

```{r}
set.seed(10)
n_vals <- c(10, 20, 50, 100, 1000)
unfair_weights <- c(rep(0.15, 5), 0.25)
lapply(n_vals, function(n) tibble(n = n, sum = throw_dice(n, weights = unfair_weights))) |>
  bind_rows() |>
  mutate(n = factor(n, levels = n_vals)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = sum)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, boundary = 0.5, color = "black", fill = "skyblue") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2:12) +
  facet_wrap(vars(n), nrow = 1, scales = "free_y", labeller = label_both) +
  labs(x = "Sum of two dice", y = "Count", title = "Histograms of unfair dice throws as n grows")
```

```{r}
#| cache: true
#| label: log-lr

log_lr <- function(rolls) {
  lrs <- ifelse(rolls == 6, 0.30 / (1/6), 0.14 / (1/6))
  log(lrs)
}
```

```{r}
#| label: stopping-times-simulation
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 5

set.seed(10)
loaded_weights <- c(rep(0.14, 5), 0.30)
log_19 <- log(19) # log-odds corresponding to 0.95 posterior probability

stopping_times <- replicate(1000, {
  rolls <- sample(1:6, 1000, replace = TRUE, prob = loaded_weights)
  running_log_odds <- cumsum(log_lr(rolls))
  which(running_log_odds >= log_19)[1]
})

median_val <- median(stopping_times)
stopping_df <- tibble(Stopping_Time = stopping_times)

stopping_df |>
  ggplot(aes(x = Stopping_Time)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 5, fill = "#4A90E2", color = "black", alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = median_val, color = "red", linetype = "dashed", size = 1) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of Rolls to Cross 0.95 Posterior",
    y = "Count",
    title = "Distribution of Stopping Times to Detect Loaded Die (1,000 Repetitions)",
    subtitle = paste("Median stopping time:", median_val, "rolls")
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "dimgray", hjust = 0.5),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```
